branches.name: stack/001-first-hunk
branches.title: Update first example line
branches.description: Applies only the first hunk in docs/example.txt.

patches.label: first line hunk
patches.patch:
diff --git a/docs/example.txt b/docs/example.txt
--- a/docs/example.txt
+++ b/docs/example.txt
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 alpha
-one
+ONE
 two
 three
 four

branches.name: stack/002-second-hunk
branches.title: Update second example line
branches.description: Applies only the second hunk in docs/example.txt.

patches.label: second line hunk
patches.patch:
diff --git a/docs/example.txt b/docs/example.txt
--- a/docs/example.txt
+++ b/docs/example.txt
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
 two
 three
 four
-five
+FIVE
 omega
